examples.title: Pseudocode: Event Handling
examples.description: Basic event handling logic in pseudocode
examples.code:
EVENT HANDLER
INPUT: event
OUTPUT: none

BEGIN
 IF event.type == 'button_click' THEN
 CALL handle_button_click(event)
 ELSE IF event.type == 'mouse_move' THEN
 CALL handle_mouse_move(event)
 END IF
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates a basic event handling mechanism. It checks the type of event and calls the corresponding handler function.

examples.title: Java: Event Handling with ActionListener
examples.description: Implementing event handling using ActionListener in Java
examples.explanation: This Java code demonstrates event handling using an ActionListener. When the button is clicked, it prints a message to the console.

examples.title: Java: Event Handling with MouseListener
examples.description: Implementing event handling using MouseListener in Java
examples.explanation: This Java code demonstrates event handling using a MouseListener. When the mouse is clicked on the panel, it prints the coordinates of the click event.
